title: E-Waste Lifecycle in an Arid Desert Environment
description: A flowchart illustrating the unique challenges and consequences of improper e-waste disposal in a desert ecosystem, connecting human activity to environmental impact.
elements: Arid Desert Conditions (Heat, Wind, Low Rainfall)
relationships: Desert heat accelerates breakdown of e-waste, Wind disperses toxic dust particles, Low rainfall concentrates leachate, leading to soil contamination, groundwater pollution, and bioaccumulation in desert species
